positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a glowing crescent moon embracing a cluster of stylized constellations and zodiac symbols. The design should feature bold, clean lines and silhouettes, rendered in a deep indigo, cosmic sapphire, and ethereal gold color palette. The composition is circular and centrally focused, ideal for a t-shirt graphic, with nebulae swirls and minimalist celestial bodies. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and modern geometric simplicity, evoking wonder and mystery. High contrast, flat vector illustration quality, designed for seamless commercial printing, deep depth of field, ultra-detailed pattern elements, poster art quality.
